emails.subject: Counterparty Approval Lists
emails.body: Counterparty Approval Lists Just a reminder, starting today until I get back after the holidays, send the counterparty approval lists to my assistant Taffy Milligan, and she will forward them to the Legal team, so they can be working on their approvals while I'm gone.
